title: 11 Herbal Creams For Abdominal Pain
description: Cinchona officinalis creams contains quinine, a natural compound that has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. When applied topically to the skin, quinine and other constituents like tannins and flavonoids in Cinchona officinalis creams help to reduce inflammation and ease abdominal pain. This is because quinine blocks the production of a chemical called bradykinin, which is involved in pain transmission.  If you experience abdominal pain, apply a small amount of Cinchona o...
